creator: adam-analytics.com

evidence.text: Communicate improvements : When a friction point is resolved, communicate the change directly to the developers who reported it. This closes the feedback loop and builds trust that the platform team listens. In one organization, this practice alone improved NPS by 15 points before any technical changes shipped.

title: Internal Developer Platforms Should Feel Like Products | Adam Analytics
